notes:
EX Series booster: 9 cards = 5 common + 2 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better slot; 36 packs/box, no ETB (era predates ETBs). Sources: Bulbapedia Booster pack page confirms 9-card EX-Series packs; Dexerto/PokeBeach community confirm 5C/2U/1RH/1rare layout.

RARE SLOT distribution (sums to 1.0):
- secret-rare: ~1:36 packs = 0.028. Flipside Gaming explicitly names "ex Dragon and ex Team Magma vs. Team Aqua" at ~1:36 packs. Set has 2 secret rares (Absol 96/95, Jirachi 97/95).
- ex (Pokemon-ex): ~1:36 packs = 0.028 (1 per booster box). Flipside Gaming: ex-era ex cards averaged 1:36 packs for most sets (only ex Power Keepers was the 1:8-12 outlier). Set has 7 ex cards.
- Remainder 0.944 split evenly between the 12 rare-holo and 12 rare cards (equal counts) per era convention that ~half of rare slots are holo: rare-holo 0.472, rare 0.472.

REVERSE-HOLO SLOT: era reverse-foil slot is common/uncommon filler (no rare-bucket bleed). Modeled as common 0.72 / uncommon 0.28 to mirror the set's 32 common vs 32 uncommon pool weighted toward commons in the reverse slot.

NO gold-star bucket: Gold Stars debuted in ex Team Rocket Returns (the NEXT set); this set predates them, so gold-star is correctly absent from the available buckets. Confidence=medium: secret-rare rate is a per-set community figure; ex and rare-holo splits are era-average rates applied to this set's bucket counts.
